title: RazeBoost [32x]
description: RazeBoost [32x] delivers clean visuals, custom skies, enhanced PvP textures, and smooth performance to help players maximize both style and gameplay.
body:
# RazeBoost [32x]

RazeBoost [32x] is a clean and performance-focused Minecraft PvP resource pack designed for competitive gameplay.

## Features

* Clean 32x PvP textures
* Custom skies
* Enhanced particles
* Optimized swords and armor
* Smooth and FPS-friendly visuals
* Clean GUI and HUD
* Great visibility during combat

## Perfect For

* BedWars
* SkyWars
* Duels
* Practice PvP
* Crystal PvP

Built for Speed, Made for PvP.
